# monolithic-full

Monolithic resource.customizations with actions map, mergeBuiltinActions, multiple definitions, useOpenLibs

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/resource-customizations/monolithic-full` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  resource.customizations: |
    apps/Deployment:
      health.lua: |
        hs = {}
        hs.status = "Healthy"
        return hs
      health.lua.useOpenLibs: true
      ignoreDifferences:
        jsonPointers:
          - /spec/replicas
      ignoreResourceUpdates:
        jsonPointers:
          - /metadata/resourceVersion
      knownTypeFields:
        - field: spec.template.spec
          type: core/v1/PodSpec
      actions:
        discovery.lua: |
          actions = {}
          actions["restart"] = {}
          actions["pause"] = {}
          return actions
        mergeBuiltinActions: true
        definitions:
          - name: restart
            action.lua: |
              return obj
          - name: pause
            action.lua: |
              obj.spec.paused = true
              return obj
    cert-manager.io/Certificate:
      health.lua: |
        return {status="Healthy"}
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  controller:
    resource:
      actions:
      - definitions:
        - actionLua: |
            return obj
          name: restart
        - actionLua: |
            obj.spec.paused = true
            return obj
          name: pause
        discoveryLua: |
          actions = {}
          actions["restart"] = {}
          actions["pause"] = {}
          return actions
        group: apps
        kind: Deployment
        mergeBuiltinActions: true
      health:
      - group: apps
        healthLua: |
          hs = {}
          hs.status = "Healthy"
          return hs
        kind: Deployment
        useOpenLibs: true
      - group: cert-manager.io
        healthLua: |
          return {status="Healthy"}
        kind: Certificate
      ignoreDifferences:
      - group: apps
        jsonPointers:
        - /spec/replicas
        kind: Deployment
      ignoreResourceUpdates:
      - group: apps
        jsonPointers:
        - /metadata/resourceVersion
        kind: Deployment
      knownTypeFields:
      - fields:
        - field: spec.template.spec
          type: core/v1/PodSpec
        group: apps
        kind: Deployment
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  resource.customizations.actions.apps_Deployment: |
    definitions:
    - action.lua: |
        return obj
      name: restart
    - action.lua: |
        obj.spec.paused = true
        return obj
      name: pause
    discovery.lua: |
      actions = {}
      actions["restart"] = {}
      actions["pause"] = {}
      return actions
    mergeBuiltinActions: true
  resource.customizations.health.apps_Deployment: |
    hs = {}
    hs.status = "Healthy"
    return hs
  resource.customizations.health.cert-manager.io_Certificate: |
    return {status="Healthy"}
  resource.customizations.ignoreDifferences.apps_Deployment: |
    jsonPointers:
    - /spec/replicas
  resource.customizations.ignoreResourceUpdates.apps_Deployment: |
    jsonPointers:
    - /metadata/resourceVersion
  resource.customizations.knownTypeFields.apps_Deployment: |
    - field: spec.template.spec
      type: core/v1/PodSpec
  resource.customizations.useOpenLibs.apps_Deployment: "true"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap

  namespace: argocd
